_readme: Audio asset registry (src/audioAssets.ts). Only approved:true assets are auto-mixed into renders. UNVERIFIED licenses must stay approved:false until Leon confirms the source and license — publishing with unlicensed audio risks takedowns/muting.

assets.license: UNVERIFIED — user-supplied 2026-07-12; file has no license metadata and its container signature (DASH remux via Lavf) matches a platform download. Confirm source + license before approving.
assets.notes: 4:45 runtime. Mood-mismatched with the dark-mystery brand bed (playbook: low drone + tick + boom). Candidate for upbeat participation formats only, and only after license verification.
